subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Lord! Verily, Thy pure and spiritual handmaiden hath forsaken this earthly life, bade farewell to her kindred, and directed her steps toward [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب ان امتک الطیبه الروحانیه ودعت الحیاه الدنیا و ودعت ذوی القربی و قصدت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
